title: helianthus pauciflorus
intro: Helianthus pauciflorus, also known as the mountain sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus pauciflorus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
